fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKWebpEncoder` provides static methods to encode raster images and animated sequences into the WebP image format. Use the `Encode` overloads for single-frame WebP images and the `EncodeAnimated` overloads for animated WebP sequences composed of multiple `SKWebpEncoderFrame` frames.

## Examples

```csharp
// Encode a single pixmap to a WebP byte array
using var pixmap = bitmap.PeekPixels();
var options = new SKWebpEncoderOptions(SKWebpEncoderCompression.Lossy, 80);
using SKData? data = SKWebpEncoder.Encode(pixmap, options);
if (data != null)
    File.WriteAllBytes("image.webp", data.ToArray());
```
]]></format>
fields.summary: Provides static methods to encode images and animated sequences as WebP.

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> instance containing the encoded WebP image, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding fails.

params.src: The source pixel data to encode.
params.options: The encoding options, including quality and compression type.

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap as a WebP image and returns the result as an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> instance.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? Encode (SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding was successful; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.options: The encoding options, including quality and compression type.
params.src: The source pixel data to encode.
params.dst: The destination stream to which the encoded WebP image is written.

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap as a WebP image and writes the result to a native stream.

entries.signature: public static bool Encode (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if encoding was successful; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.options: The encoding options, including quality and compression type.
params.src: The source pixel data to encode.
params.dst: The destination stream to which the encoded WebP image is written.

fields.summary: Encodes the specified pixmap as a WebP image and writes the result to a managed stream.

entries.signature: public static bool Encode (System.IO.Stream dst, SkiaSharp.SKPixmap src, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

fields.returns: An <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> instance containing the encoded animated WebP image, or <see langword="null" /> if encoding fails.

params.options: The encoding options, including quality and compression type.

fields.summary: Encodes the specified frames as an animated WebP image and returns the result as an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKData" /> instance.

entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKData? EncodeAnimated (ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

params.options: The encoding options, including quality and compression type.
params.dst: The destination native stream to which the encoded animated WebP image is written.
params.frames: The sequence of frames to include in the animated WebP image.

fields.summary: Encodes the specified frames as an animated WebP image and writes the result to a native stream.

entries.signature: public static bool EncodeAnimated (SkiaSharp.SKWStream dst, ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);

params.dst: The destination managed stream to which the encoded animated WebP image is written.
params.frames: The sequence of frames to include in the animated WebP image.

fields.summary: Encodes the specified frames as an animated WebP image and writes the result to a managed stream.

entries.signature: public static bool EncodeAnimated (System.IO.Stream dst, ReadOnlySpan<SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderFrame> frames, SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoderOptions options);
